## Meeting Purpose

[To review and create an invoice for David's contract, including pro-rated amounts for February.](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Contract section 5.3 confirmed for deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [February invoice created: $2,082.14 (pro-rated from Feb 18th)](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [New invoice schedule set up for David, starting Feb 3rd](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Team overview and invoice schedule updated in the system](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

## Topics

### Contract Review

  - [Confirmed section 5.3 of the contract pertains to deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Double-checked to ensure accuracy in contractual details](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

### Invoice Creation for David

  - [Created pro-rated invoice for February](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Full monthly amount: $5,300](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Pro-rated calculation:](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [11 days (Feb 18-28) out of 28 days total](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [(5300 / 28) \* 11 = $2,082.14 (rounded up from $2,082.85)](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Invoice set as one-time payment](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

  - [Created new invoice schedule for David](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [Start date: February 3rd](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [Frequency: Monthly](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [Amount: $5,300 (full monthly rate for future invoices)](https://fathom.video/share/GwewNL5vdZsPbS3EiHabQBbsX9V1gMS8?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
